_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Supplier'S Configuration Management PLAN
summary: The Supplier's Configuration Management Plan describes the organization, procedures, and controls of the CM program, providing the Government a basis for review, evaluation, and monitoring of the program and its proposed components.
use_relationship:
The Supplier's Configuration Management (CM) Plan describes the organization, procedures, and controls of the Supplier's CM program. The principle use is to provide the Government a basis for review, evaluation, and monitoring of the CM program and associated proposed components.
This DID contains the format, content, and intended use information for the data deliverable resulting from the work task described in EIA-649-1 and the principles of EIA-649 (Copies of these standards are available online at www.sae.org or from SAE International, 400 Commonwealth Drive, Warrendale, PA 15096-0001, Tel 877-606-7323 [inside USA and Canada] or 724-776-4970 [outside USA]).
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference Documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The Supplier's CM plan shall be prepared in Supplier format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The Supplier's CM plan shall identify the Supplier's processes and procedures for:

children.title: Configuration management and planning over the lifecycle of a product.
Configuration identification throughout the product lifecycle.
Configuration change management involves controlling and documenting the product and its product configuration information to the product's end of life.
Configuration status accounting involves recording and reporting of information needed to trace and manage configuration of a product.
Verification and audits to ensure consistency of product information are established and maintained in the execution of the total configuration, including hardware, software, and firmware.
